groups.theme: Pricing clarity and usable free access
example_reviews: Went through the trial cancellation flow and still got charged later.
The app looks good, but almost everything is behind a paywall.
groups.notes: Refined the automated monetization group to focus on paywall clarity, trial terms, and free-tier access.

example_reviews: Sessions stop with a 'Something went wrong' message in the middle.
The app takes too long to load and still errors even after downloads.
groups.notes: Kept the automated bug cluster but narrowed it to session stability, loading, and playback interruptions.

example_reviews: After reinstalling or switching devices, access does not come back properly.
The app gets stuck in sign-in problems and support is not helpful.
groups.notes: Corrected the automated outputs by restoring a clear login and account-recovery group from the review evidence.

example_reviews: It is hard to save meditations and find them again later.
Courses and recommended content get pinned in confusing ways.
groups.notes: Refined the automated design/functionality group to focus on findability, resume paths, and saved content.

example_reviews: Users want clearer guidance and more structure in their practice.
The interface and progress experience should help habits, not get in the way.
groups.notes: Refined the broader user-expectation group into a habit-building and progress-visibility theme.
